g.text: I identified that Ace360's enrolment process relied on manual tutor matching
and lacked a confirmation loop — causing recurring errors.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about tutor-student mismatch errors')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the communication gap')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the visibility gap across the team')
sendPrompt('What specifically goes wrong at tutor assignment?')
sendPrompt('Why is the notification step a problem?')
sendPrompt('How would automated matching rules work?')
sendPrompt('What would a two-way confirmation look like?')
sendPrompt('What does centralised tracking mean here?')
sendPrompt('How did you estimate the reduction in mismatch errors?')
sendPrompt('How would onboarding time be reduced?')

g.text: I identified these inefficiencies through direct system coordination at Ace360,
analysed root causes, and proposed process improvements to management.
